generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us less safe? While some argue for more international cooperation, the truth is that strategic autonomy is the only way to ensure our security. Look at how Germany's decision to reduce dependence on foreign energy systems has made them more resilient. It's time we prioritize our own preparedness over empty promises of global unity. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
